mapper.select: SELECT * FROM Indicators as I LEFT JOIN Elements as E on I.indicators_id = E.indicators_id

SELECT * FROM Indicators_Activity as IA LEFT JOIN Indicators as I on IA.indicators_id = I.indicators_id LEFT JOIN Elements as E on I.indicators_id = E.indicators_id WHERE IA.activity_id = #{activityId}

SELECT U.id as userId, username, year, sum(totalScore) as totalScore FROM User_Fraction as UF LEFT JOIN Activity as A ON UF.activity_id = A.activity_id LEFT JOIN User as U ON UF.user_id = U.id WHERE #{year} IS NULL OR A.year = #{year} GROUP BY U.id, year, username

SELECT U.id as userId, username, year, sum(totalScore) as totalScore FROM User_Fraction as UF LEFT JOIN Activity as A ON UF.activity_id = A.activity_id LEFT JOIN User as U ON UF.user_id = U.id WHERE A.activity_id = #{activityId} GROUP BY U.id, username
